lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another Varrock platebody?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I'm Toby, the taskmaster for the Varrock Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Varrock and the surrounding area it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: reward you.

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: Well, there are four different Varrock armours, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Varrock, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to coal and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to steel, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: stock 15 Battlestaves per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to mithril and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to mithril, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will stock 30

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: Battlestaves per day

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to adamant and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to adamant, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: will stock 60 Battlestaves per day and you can access the bank at the Cooking guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, you have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to runite and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to runite, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will stock

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: 120 Battlestaves per day and the plate functions as a Prospector top.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in the Varrock area so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Varrock Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: This armour is a symbol of your exploration of Varrock. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to coal and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to steel, when using the Edgeville

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: furnace. Zaff will stock 15 Battlestaves per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Varrock achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I've upgraded your Varrock armour for you. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to mithril and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to mithril, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: stock 30 Battlestaves per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Varrock achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I've upgraded your Varrock armour for you. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to adamant and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to adamant, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: will stock 60 Battlestaves per day and you can now access the bank at the Cooking guild.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Varrock achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy, medium and hard tasks too before I can reward you for the elite task set.

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Varrock area! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: I've upgraded your Varrock armour for you. You now have a 10% chance of mining two ores at once up to runite and a 10% chance of smelting 2 bars at once up to runite, when using the Edgeville furnace. Zaff will

lines.speaker: Toby
lines.text: stock 120 Battlestaves per day and the plate functions as a Prospector top.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
